mnemonics: BLOCKS: Bundled Ledgers Of Cryptographic Keepsakes Securely
keyPoints: A blockchain is a distributed database or ledger shared among nodes.
It stores information electronically in digital format, forming an immutable chain.
Its core innovation is guaranteeing the fidelity and security of a data record without a trusted third party.
commonMistakes: Assuming blockchain and Bitcoin are the same thing (Bitcoin is an application *of* blockchain technology).
Believing all data on a blockchain is inherently private or anonymous (data is often pseudonymous and can be public).
